parameters.content:
## RESUMEIQ — SEND EMAIL WORKFLOW

Actually sends the email HR composed (with or without AI help) to a candidate. This is the ONLY workflow in ResumeIQ that sends real email — the Email Assistant workflow only ever drafts text, never sends. The frontend calls this workflow exclusively from the Send button, never automatically.

**STATUS: send + error handling only — sheet logging + success response added next.**

**IMPORTANT:** the Gmail credential used for reading inbox resumes may not have Gmail's *send* permission scope. If sending fails with a permissions/scope error, reconnect the Gmail credential and make sure you approve the full requested scope during the Google consent screen.
